title: Accurately 3D Mace
description: Accurately portrays the heavy core on the mace in 3D. Includes a Held Model Only option in the version list.
body:
Accurately portrays the heavy core on the mace in 3D.

I made this resource pack because I was unhappy with how most 3D mace resource packs looked, and uploaded it for the hell of it.

Takes from vanilla base textures, so it should be compatible with texture packs that dont change the shape of the handle too much.
